files.title: Files
files.subtitle: Browse the files and data for OpenMasjidOS and your apps.
files.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

auth.setupSubtitle: Let's create your admin account to get started.
auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to manage your masjid's apps.
auth.passwordTooShort: Your password needs to be at least 8 characters.
auth.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.resetIntro: You'll need terminal access to the machine running OpenMasjidOS — at it directly or over SSH. Then run:
auth.resetOutro: Then come back here and sign in. Your apps and data are untouched.

dashboard.statusError: Could not reach the server. Check that OpenMasjidOS is running.
dashboard.noAppsBody: Browse the App Store to find apps for your masjid — prayer times, announcements, donation pages, and more.

appCard.removeBody: This turns the app off and removes it from your dashboard.
appCard.removeData: Also delete this app's data (cannot be undone)

store.title: App Store
store.subtitle: Find and install apps for your masjid
store.emptyHint: The app catalog is on its way. Check back soon.
store.installError: Something went wrong while installing. Please try again.

custom.title: Install a custom app
custom.desc: Paste a Docker Compose file to run any app on your masjid's server.
custom.warning: Custom apps come from outside the OpenMasjidOS store and aren't reviewed by us. A bad or untrusted file can break your server or expose it. Only install ones you trust.
custom.name: App name
custom.dangersTitle: This app asks for powerful permissions:
custom.riskAck: I understand the risk and want to install it anyway.
custom.nameRequired: Please give the app a name.
custom.composeRequired: Please paste a Docker Compose file.
custom.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
custom.enableFirst: Custom apps are turned off. Enable them in Settings → Advanced first.
custom.disabledBody: Turn on "Allow custom apps" in Settings → Advanced to install community apps or your own Compose files.

community.title: 3rd Party Apps
community.subtitle: Install community apps from app stores, or paste your own Docker Compose file.
community.reposHint: Add a CasaOS-compatible app store (a link to its repository). Only add stores you trust.
community.noRepos: No app stores yet. Add a CasaOS-compatible repository to browse community apps.
community.noApps: No apps found in your app stores.
community.addRepoError: Couldn't read that app store. Check the link points to a CasaOS-compatible repository.
community.casaNote: Tip: use CasaOS-compatible app stores. Paste the link to the store's repository (a .zip or GitHub repo URL).

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Customize your dashboard
settings.wallpaperImageHint: Paste an image URL to use your own wallpaper. Overrides the preset above.
settings.dashboardNameHint: Shown in the greeting. Leave blank for the default.
settings.showSplash: Play the welcome animation on load
settings.languageHint: More translations are on the way — only English is complete for now.
settings.customAppsHint: Adds a "3rd Party App" button to the App Store for installing community apps or your own Docker Compose files. Only turn this on if you know what you're doing.
settings.webTerminalHint: Adds an "Open shell" option to each app so you can run commands inside it from the browser. Powerful — anyone signed in gets shell access to your apps.
settings.rootTerminalHint: Adds a root shell into the OpenMasjidOS core itself (full control of Docker on this server). Only enable this if you understand the risk.
settings.updateAvailable: Version {{version}} is available. Re-run the installer to update.
settings.backupHint: Saves a copy of your settings and app data as a single file.
settings.sourceCodeHint: OpenMasjidOS is free and open source (AGPL-3.0).

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.network: Cannot reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
errors.notFoundHint: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.
